title: elasis guatemalensis
intro: Elasis guatemalensis is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds that exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits. Elasis guatemalensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function.
